subcodes.first_line: O spiritual leaves! Blessed are ye for having been attracted by the fragrances of God and for your hearts being illumined with light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات روحانیات طوبی لکن بما انجذبتن بنفحات الله و استضائت قلوبکن بنور
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
